roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:APD PROGRESS RPT RE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAMS//X:DEFT TO FIND A 9-MONTH RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM TO SATISFY THE COMMITMENT,//X:SHANNON BENNETT OF PD'S OFFICE MAY ASSIST DEFENDANT,/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:11-12-03//X:IF DEFT IS NOT IN A PROGRAM, THEN DEFENSE TO PROVIDE WRITTEN REPORT OF EFFORTS TO FIND ONE,/CONTD:#26 0900 11-12-03 FOR APD PROGRESS RPT ON RESIDENTIAL PGM/
